title: MDM Policy Forced a Mid-ESP Reboot (Second Sign-In)
description: Attributes an observed enrollment reboot to device-assigned MDM policies that Windows flagged as reboot-required. Fires ONLY when both facts are present in the session: at least one actually-observed reboot (system_reboot_detected) AND reboot-required policy flags (mdm_policy_reboot_required). Policy flags alone — e.g. from a user-policy sync during AccountSetup — force no reboot and stay advisory-silent.
author: Autopilot Monitor
explanation:
This session **rebooted during enrollment**, and Windows flagged one or more device-assigned MDM policies as **reboot-required** — the classic cause of the coalesced mid-ESP restart and the unexpected **second sign-in screen** before AccountSetup.

First reboot-forcing policy URI: `{{firstRebootUri}}`

The complete URI list is in the `mdm_policy_reboot_required` timeline event (`rebootUris`). Policies applied DURING ESP DeviceSetup are coalesced into one forced restart at the end of DeviceSetup; the same flags raised later (e.g. user-policy sync in AccountSetup) have no immediate effect — this advisory only fires when a reboot was actually observed.

This is expected OS behavior, not a failure — but it degrades the enrollment experience, confuses users, and is invisible in the Intune console.

remediation.title: Reassign the reboot-forcing policies to user groups
steps: Open the `mdm_policy_reboot_required` timeline event and note the CSP URIs in `rebootUris` (e.g. `./Device/Vendor/MSFT/...`)
Map each URI to its Intune profile (Settings Catalog / configuration profile) — the URI path names the CSP area
Reassign those profiles from device groups to user groups so they apply during/after AccountSetup instead of DeviceSetup
Alternatively, exclude the Autopilot device group from the profile and deliver the setting post-enrollment

remediation.title: Or accept the reboot and set expectations
steps: If the policy must be device-assigned (e.g. a security baseline), keep it and document the expected mid-ESP restart
Communicate to users that a restart and second sign-in during provisioning is expected for these deployments

relatedDocs.title: Patch My PC: Avoid the second sign-in screen after Autopilot
